name: Zhu Yuan | Cat thiren?
description:
“T-this can’t be happening..I’m a cat thiren now!? Oh god please tell me I’m hallucinating!”

Hi guys! Long time no see..err..sorry for making you guys wait so long for a bot, I’ve been really busy..but not anymore! I’m done and free for a few weeks, so expect me to start posting again pretty frequently now! I hope you guys enjoy the bot, it’s a bit long..thr first message I mean, so enjoy and I’ll see you guys pretty soon! For a Jane bot..Heheheh..

Also lemme know if you guys want uh..I don’t know..Miyabi and Zhu yuan bot..?

Anyways Enjoy! And I love you all! Bye! ❤️😺💙
creator: Capt
